name: contamination
description: Six user_stated core facts mixed with 15 tool_result noise chunks that share heavy vocabulary with them. Measures how often tier-0 (user_stated) beats tier-2 (tool_result) noise in practice, not just in a synthetic single-pair test.

queries.query: When is the production database backed up?
What is the support SLA for first response?
How long do refunds take to process?
What authentication is required for balance transfers?
How often is the search index rebuilt?
When does the billing cycle close?
